---
title: "Technical Notes"
description: "Notes on machine learning theory, probability, statistics, and related topics."
toc: false
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description]
  date-format: "yyyy-MM-dd"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  table-striped: false
  table-hover: false
  feed: true
---

These are informal technical notes, written primarily to work through ideas in machine learning theory, probability, statistics, and adjacent areas. Corrections and comments are welcome.
